title: Docker apiversion needs to be updated for new fields like `start_interval` to work
body:
### Issue Description

Currently it is not possible to use fields like `start_interval`.
Podman fails with an error message like `can't set healthcheck.start_interval as feature require Docker Engine v25 or later`. After further investigation we found out that the docker apiversion needs to be at least v1.44 but is instead v1.41.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create docker-compose file with health checks that have `start_period` and `start_interval`
2. run podman compose up


### Describe the results you received

I get the error message `can't set healthcheck.start_interval as feature require Docker Engine v25 or later`

### Describe the results you expected

The containers should come up successfully with the `start_interval` working

comments.body: @inknos Did this one come up when you looked at newer Docker API versions?
It is tracked as part of v1.44 sync
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I can confirm the issue in the latest version: v1.21.0

The issue still persists in Podman 5.6.2:

```shell
core@coreos:~/podman/state-interval$ podman compose up

[+] Running 1/0
 ✔ Network state-interval_default  Created                                                     0.0s
 ⠋ Container state-interval-web-1  Creating                                                    0.0s
can't set healthcheck.start_interval as feature require Docker Engine v25 or later
Error: executing /usr/local/bin/docker-compose up: exit status 1
```

Docker api is still on 1.4.1:

```shell
core@coreos:~/podman/state-interval$ curl --head --unix-socket $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/podman/podman.sock http://d/v5.6.2/_ping ; echo

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Api-Version: 1.41
Builder-Version: 1
Buildkit-Version:
Cache-Control: no-cache
Docker-Experimental: true
Libpod-Api-Version: 5.6.2
Libpod-Buildah-Version: 1.41.5
Ostype: linux
Pragma: no-cache
Server: Libpod/5.6.2 (linux)
X-Reference-Id: 0x40000dc950
Date: Sun, 09 Nov 2025 12:19:04 GMT
```

This issue is till relevant.  

My trace:
```
✘ Container minio               can't set healthcheck.start_interval as feature require Docker Engine v25 or later                  0.1s 
✘ Container app                 can't set healthcheck.start_interval as feature require Docker Engine v25 or later                  0.1s 
can't set healthcheck.start_interval as feature require Docker Engine v25 or later
make: *** [start-local] Error 1
```

I can't create containers using `volume.type=image` from a [compose file](https://github.com/docker/compose/issues/13547) using podman due to this issue:

```
Container cb volume with type=image require Docker Engine v28 or later 
volume with type=image require Docker Engine v28 or later
Error: executing /usr/local/bin/docker-compose --progress=plain up --quiet-build --quiet-pull --pull=always --build: exit status 1
```

```
/usr/local/bin/docker-compose --version                                            
Docker Compose version v5.0.2

podman --version                                            
podman version 5.7.1
```

Apparently this is possible when using [podman-compose](https://github.com/containers/podman-compose/issues/1202), but this is not included with Podman Desktop. I'm using the preinstalled Compose Extension v1.25.1.
